name: Baby Hot Browns
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve bouillon cube in hot water and combine with half-and-half in a saucepan.
2. Melt butter and add flour. Whisk until the mixture is frothy and no raw flour taste remains.
3. Stir in the bouillon mixture while continuously whisking to prevent lumps.
4. Add Swiss cheese, stirring until smooth. If needed, add water and heat to achieve desired consistency.
5. Assemble hot browns by placing turkey slices and onion on each bread slice.
6. Spread sauce evenly over the top of each sandwich.
7. Crumble bacon over the sauce.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes or until heated through.
9. Garnish with parsley before serving.
